name: qje-skills
description: Agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at the Quarterly Journal of Economics (QJE), one of the top-5 economics journals. Covers big-question topic selection, literature positioning, credible causal identification (RCT / staggered DID / IV / RDD), theory-model framing, extensive robustness and online appendices, figure-forward exhibits, QJE house style, replication packages, referee strategy, Editorial Express submission, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python conventions.
